summary: The user is planning a trip to Chicago and seeks hotel recommendations, expressing familiarity with the city from previous visits. They also discuss a recent trip to Paris and express interest in returning, considering a 5-day itinerary while exploring options for future travel to Europe.
facts: The user is planning a trip to Chicago and is looking for hotel recommendations. The user has previously stayed with family in Chicago and has never booked a hotel themselves. The user is considering staying in the Loop and River North areas of Chicago. The user walked along the Lake Michigan shoreline in April with their sister while visiting their aunt. The user has traveled to a few cities in the US but has never been to Europe. The user is considering Paris, Rome, or Barcelona for their next trip to Europe. The user recently returned from a trip to Paris last month, which they described as amazing. The user plans to spend around 5 days in Paris for their next trip. The user stayed at a hotel near the Eiffel Tower during their last trip to Paris. The user spent their days exploring the city during their last trip to Paris.
